summary: Repaired the Tomas reward-meal object timeline, made Noor's cafeteria-server-room-pod-cafeteria route legible on explicit floors, removed the packet-flagged diction recurrences, and normalized Tomas naming. All seven packet findings are fixed in the live chapter.
